§6Matrix Frame§f:
The §6Matrix Frame §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_unit) is a §especial-purpose structural block §f used in the §6Spatial IO §f system. It is §6automatically placed §f by the network during a §6Spatial IO §f transfer and is §6unobtainable §f in survival.

§6Production Path (BlockMatrixFrame.java:42-83)§f:
- §bNo player crafting recipe §f: the Matrix Frame §ccannot §f be crafted by a player
- §bAuto-placement §f: when a §6Spatial IO Port §f performs a §bwrite §foperation, the network §6wraps the destination region §f in Matrix Frames (StorageHelper.java:144, 206-211)
- §bMaterial §f: §6Material.ANVIL §f — extremely dense
- §bResistance §f: §b6,000,000 §f — effectively unbreakable
- §bBlock hardness §f: §b-1.0 §f (setBlockUnbreakable) — can §cnot §f be mined
- §bCan place §f: §bfalse §f — players cannot place the block
- §bCan be destroyed §f: §bfalse §f — explosions cannot break it
- §bLight opacity §f: §b0 §f — fully transparent

§6Function§f:
- §bSpatial IO wrapper §f: a §6solid shell §f around a §6Spatial IO §f region during a transfer
- §bNo entity interaction §f: mobs and players can §6pass through §f the Matrix Frame freely
- §bNo collision §f: the Matrix Frame is §6non-solid §f for entity collision, but the §bblock entity §f is solid
- §bNo light blocking §f: the frame is §6fully transparent §f for lighting purposes
- §bAuto-cleanup §f: after the §6Spatial IO §f transfer completes, the Matrix Frame is §6automatically removed §f

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Matrix Frame is a component of (no recipe_count, no use_count). The block is §6entirely internal §f to AE2's Spatial IO system.

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: if you see a §6Matrix Frame §f in your world, a §6Spatial IO §f transfer is in progress; wait for it to finish
- §eTip§f: a stuck Matrix Frame usually indicates a §cbcrashed §fSpatial IO §f transfer — break the §6Spatial IO Port §f and §6reassemble §f the multiblock
- §cWarning§f: the Matrix Frame is §6unbreakable §f in normal gameplay
- §cWarning§f: do §cnot §f attempt to §6break §f a Matrix Frame with a §6pickaxe §f — it will not drop and the tool will lose durability
- §cWarning§f: the Matrix Frame is §6specific §f to the §bSpatial IO §f system; there is no §6recipe §f or §6way to obtain it §f via §6survival §f gameplay
